item.title: Online Bulk SMS [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Online Bulk SMS [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
Online Bulk SMS
(Utilities)
Website www.onlinesmstextmessaging.com offers well featured Online Bulk SMS tool for composing and transmitting multiple messages about Meetings, events, job alerts, interview etc from PC to worldwide mobile phone users. Proficient Bulk SMS software offers techniques for sending multiple promotional messages to business clients from Windows PC without paying any hidden charge. Bulk messages Software is widely used in universities, colleges and other business firms for transmitting any information via free text SMS from PC without any internet connectivity.

[read more]

item.title: Convert Contact List to vCard [Office Apps]
item.itunes:title: Convert Contact List to vCard [Office Apps]
item.itunes:author: databaseconverter1
item.itunes:summary:
Convert Contact List to vCard
(Office Apps)
Excel to vCard files conversion utility. Convert Contact List to vCard tool exchange multiple contacts into vCard data. Website www.convertmydatabase.com is useful for business users to get award winning Convert Contact List to vCard utility that offers simplified way to migrate entire contact data from excel sheets into .VCF file formats. Company offers user friendly excel to vCard migration program on www.convertmydatabase.com website that enables users to convert all contact information saved in excel spreadsheet into vCard files. Well featured Convert Contact List to vCard application exchange complete excel contact data into .VCF files without requirement of MS- Outlook installation.

[read more]
item.description:

(Office Apps)
Excel to vCard files conversion utility. Convert Contact List to vCard tool exchange multiple contacts into vCard data. Website www.convertmydatabase.com is useful for business users to get award winning Convert Contact List to vCard utility that offers simplified way to migrate entire contact data from excel sheets into .VCF file formats. Company offers user friendly excel to vCard migration program on www.convertmydatabase.com website that enables users to convert all contact information saved in excel spreadsheet into vCard files. Well featured Convert Contact List to vCard application exchange complete excel contact data into .VCF files without requirement of MS- Outlook installation.

[read more]

Excel to vCard files conversion utility. Convert Contact List to vCard tool exchange multiple contacts into vCard data. Website www.convertmydatabase.com is useful for business users to get award winning Convert Contact List to vCard utility that offers simplified way to migrate entire contact data from excel sheets into .VCF file formats. Company offers user friendly excel to vCard migration program on www.convertmydatabase.com website that enables users to convert all contact information saved in excel spreadsheet into vCard files. Well featured Convert Contact List to vCard application exchange complete excel contact data into .VCF files without requirement of MS- Outlook installation.

[read more]

item.title: MeshLab [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:title: MeshLab [3D Graphics]
item.itunes:author: jnunez
item.itunes:summary:
MeshLab
(3D Graphics)
MeshLab is an open source, portable, and extensible system for the processing and editing of unstructured large 3D triangular meshes. It is aimed to help the processing of the typical not-so-small unstructured models arising in 3D scanning, providing a set of tools for editing, cleaning, healing, inspecting, rendering and converting this kind of meshes. These tools include MshLab proper, a versatile program with a graphical user interface, and meshlabserver, a program that can perform mesh processing tasks in batch mode, without a GUI.

[read more]
item.description:
MeshLab
(3D Graphics)
MeshLab is an open source, portable, and extensible system for the processing and editing of unstructured large 3D triangular meshes. It is aimed to help the processing of the typical not-so-small unstructured models arising in 3D scanning, providing a set of tools for editing, cleaning, healing, inspecting, rendering and converting this kind of meshes. These tools include MshLab proper, a versatile program with a graphical user interface, and meshlabserver, a program that can perform mesh processing tasks in batch mode, without a GUI.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
MeshLab
(3D Graphics)
MeshLab is an open source, portable, and extensible system for the processing and editing of unstructured large 3D triangular meshes. It is aimed to help the processing of the typical not-so-small unstructured models arising in 3D scanning, providing a set of tools for editing, cleaning, healing, inspecting, rendering and converting this kind of meshes. These tools include MshLab proper, a versatile program with a graphical user interface, and meshlabserver, a program that can perform mesh processing tasks in batch mode, without a GUI.

[read more]

item.title: Arch Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: Arch Mirror Changer [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

old terminal v1.0 script scrapped in favour of my new v1.01 appimage
you will need qt6 installed
all functions tested and working
new photos updated

new features
enable kde unstable
open konsole
exit

[read more]
item.description:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

old terminal v1.0 script scrapped in favour of my new v1.01 appimage
you will need qt6 installed
all functions tested and working
new photos updated

new features
enable kde unstable
open konsole
exit

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Arch Mirror Changer
(Utilities)
hello world its me aaron again
i made a arch mirror changer

you can change to testing repos or unstable or back to normal

old terminal v1.0 script scrapped in favour of my new v1.01 appimage
you will need qt6 installed
all functions tested and working
new photos updated

new features
enable kde unstable
open konsole
exit

[read more]

item.title: claudemods-gpudrivers [Utilities]
item.itunes:title: claudemods-gpudrivers [Utilities]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
claudemods-gpudrivers
(Utilities)
claudemods-gpudrivers v1.03
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any arch distro with pyqt6 installed

v1.04
fixes multilib issue removing the need for .zips
additional options for nvidia can be found in my second photo
also new nvidia driver options are
900/1000 series
also 1650ti/1660ti/20 series and up

v1.03+
fixes for commands
appimage update
now the gpudrivers installer is an appimage
you will need to download the .zip needed
and to uncompress into /opt

currently you can install
intel drivers
amd drivers
and default nvidia packages

i want to add options for nvidia versions
this should be in the next version


to use the application just run the .bin file

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications


[read more]
item.description:
claudemods-gpudrivers
(Utilities)
claudemods-gpudrivers v1.03
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any arch distro with pyqt6 installed

v1.04
fixes multilib issue removing the need for .zips
additional options for nvidia can be found in my second photo
also new nvidia driver options are
900/1000 series
also 1650ti/1660ti/20 series and up

v1.03+
fixes for commands
appimage update
now the gpudrivers installer is an appimage
you will need to download the .zip needed
and to uncompress into /opt

currently you can install
intel drivers
amd drivers
and default nvidia packages

i want to add options for nvidia versions
this should be in the next version


to use the application just run the .bin file

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications


[read more]
item.content:encoded:
claudemods-gpudrivers
(Utilities)
claudemods-gpudrivers v1.03
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
but can be used on any arch distro with pyqt6 installed

v1.04
fixes multilib issue removing the need for .zips
additional options for nvidia can be found in my second photo
also new nvidia driver options are
900/1000 series
also 1650ti/1660ti/20 series and up

v1.03+
fixes for commands
appimage update
now the gpudrivers installer is an appimage
you will need to download the .zip needed
and to uncompress into /opt

currently you can install
intel drivers
amd drivers
and default nvidia packages

i want to add options for nvidia versions
this should be in the next version


to use the application just run the .bin file

if you would like to use the application
as a system application e.g from application menu
copy the folder to /opt
and copy the .desktop to your applications directory e.g usr/share/applications


[read more]

item.title: Torpedo [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:title: Torpedo [Terminal Apps]
item.itunes:author: claudemods
item.itunes:summary:
Torpedo
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14
v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
item.description:
Torpedo
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14
v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Torpedo
(Terminal Apps)
claudemods-qt6terminal v2.0.14
v2.0.14
renamed to Torpedo
this is for arch plasma 6.1.4
package and update commands now work
removed execute button and changed to reset
watch my video showcasing the terminal on youtube
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ymLpQvtcU5I

v2.0.12 update new functions are
new appimage of my qt6 terminal
1: alot of improvements for commands
to make it univeral to arch debian and ubuntu and dnf
2 : new way of changing themes
3: delete pacman .lck button
4: automatic push enter for commads to execute

bash history is broken i will fix this in next update
i may make the .lck feature universal in next update
all has been test and works otherwise

5 named themes to choose from check photos
[read more]

item.title: GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:title: GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging [Chat & Messenging]
item.itunes:author: onlinesmsmessaging
item.itunes:summary:
GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging application is useful for different organization for forwarding news, job alert, wishing, invitation, notification, business information, product detail, greeting, events and other via text message from PC to globally mobile number. PC to mobile messaging software is designed for GSM mobile phones that connected with PC for transmit mass text message to your friends, relatives and other person cell phone number.

[read more]
item.description:
GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging application is useful for different organization for forwarding news, job alert, wishing, invitation, notification, business information, product detail, greeting, events and other via text message from PC to globally mobile number. PC to mobile messaging software is designed for GSM mobile phones that connected with PC for transmit mass text message to your friends, relatives and other person cell phone number.

[read more]
item.content:encoded:
GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging
(Chat & Messenging)
GSM Mobile Phones Text Messaging application is useful for different organization for forwarding news, job alert, wishing, invitation, notification, business information, product detail, greeting, events and other via text message from PC to globally mobile number. PC to mobile messaging software is designed for GSM mobile phones that connected with PC for transmit mass text message to your friends, relatives and other person cell phone number.

[read more]

item.title: Publii Open-Source Static CMS [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:title: Publii Open-Source Static CMS [Internet Apps]
item.itunes:author: bobmitro
item.itunes:summary:
Publii Open-Source Static CMS
(Internet Apps)
Publii is a desktop-based CMS for Linux, Windows, and Mac that makes creating static websites fast and hassle-free, for beginners and developers.
Unlike static-site generators that are often unwieldy and difficult to use, Publii provides an easy-to-understand UI much like server-based CMSs such as WordPress, where users can create posts and other site content, and style their site using a variety of built-in themes and options. Users can enjoy the benefits of a super-fast and secure static website, with all the convenience that a CMS provides.
What makes Publii even more unique is that the app runs locally on your desktop rather than on the site's server. Once the app has been installed you can create a site in minutes, even without internet access; since Publii is a desktop app you can create, update and modify your site offline, then upload the site changes to your server at the click of a button.

Publii supports multiple upload options, including standard HTTP/HTTPS servers, Netlify, Amazon S3, GitHub Pages, GitLab Pages and Google Cloud or SFTP.
[read more]
item.description:
Publii Open-Source Static CMS
(Internet Apps)
Publii is a desktop-based CMS for Linux, Windows, and Mac that makes creating static websites fast and hassle-free, for beginners and developers.
Unlike static-site generators that are often unwieldy and difficult to use, Publii provides an easy-to-understand UI much like server-based CMSs such as WordPress, where users can create posts and other site content, and style their site using a variety of built-in themes and options. Users can enjoy the benefits of a super-fast and secure static website, with all the convenience that a CMS provides.
What makes Publii even more unique is that the app runs locally on your desktop rather than on the site's server. Once the app has been installed you can create a site in minutes, even without internet access; since Publii is a desktop app you can create, update and modify your site offline, then upload the site changes to your server at the click of a button.

Publii supports multiple upload options, including standard HTTP/HTTPS servers, Netlify, Amazon S3, GitHub Pages, GitLab Pages and Google Cloud or SFTP.
[read more]
item.content:encoded:
Publii Open-Source Static CMS
(Internet Apps)
Publii is a desktop-based CMS for Linux, Windows, and Mac that makes creating static websites fast and hassle-free, for beginners and developers.
Unlike static-site generators that are often unwieldy and difficult to use, Publii provides an easy-to-understand UI much like server-based CMSs such as WordPress, where users can create posts and other site content, and style their site using a variety of built-in themes and options. Users can enjoy the benefits of a super-fast and secure static website, with all the convenience that a CMS provides.
What makes Publii even more unique is that the app runs locally on your desktop rather than on the site's server. Once the app has been installed you can create a site in minutes, even without internet access; since Publii is a desktop app you can create, update and modify your site offline, then upload the site changes to your server at the click of a button.

Publii supports multiple upload options, including standard HTTP/HTTPS servers, Netlify, Amazon S3, GitHub Pages, GitLab Pages and Google Cloud or SFTP.
[read more]

(Chat & Messenging)
Advance technical SMS software from www.onlinesmstextmessaging.com facilitates compose or deliver job alert, arrange business meeting in few minutes. Buy Online Bulk SMS application for creating and sending text messages from PC to various mobile phones in few countable steps.
